entries.subject: Bruce Van Natta
entries.summary: Diesel mechanic crushed by a 4.5-tonne truck axle in 2006 Wisconsin. Five major arteries severed. Reports seeing two angels with hands beneath the truck. Survives. Months later, his small intestine has tripled in length with no medical explanation.

entries.subject: Annabel Beam
entries.summary: Nine-year-old Texas girl with rare incurable digestive disorder (pseudo-obstruction motility disorder). Falls 30 feet straight down inside a hollow cottonwood tree. Unconscious for 5 hours during the rescue. Reports visiting heaven and meeting Jesus. Comes out uninjured — and her documented digestive disorder is gone. Specialist Dr. Samuel Nurko at Boston Children's confirms the inexplicable disappearance.
